project.name: FlowForge
project.summary: Workflow automation platform with a CLI, TUI, browser dashboard, daemon runtime, scheduler, integration connectors, context store, tool execution, automation-route selection, and a centralized workflow execution engine.

notes: Sanitized, relabeled Architext review corpus derived from a real multi-surface automation runtime.
Structure (graph topology, flows, C4 levels, release scope) is preserved 1:1; only identity-bearing labels and prose are generic.
Built deterministically by test/fixtures/corpus-build.mjs for rendering review; not a live project's architecture.
